caption: 周末就这样没了。
scene: Sage and Andy slumped at opposite ends of the linen sofa on a Sunday evening, both staring up at a single round wall clock showing 9:00, one of Andy's house slippers fallen on the floor, faint flat expressions, a small window beside them with one tiny crescent moon
bible_hook: §2.5 the Sunday-evening 'where did the weekend go'
rationale: Recent posts leaned on solo work moments and cozy snack/lasagna scenes; this is a shared work-life-pressure beat (Sunday dread) with a fresh clock-staring motif not used in the last 30 days.
